title: phlox subulata subvar. hentzii
intro: Phlox subulata subvar. hentzii, also known as creeping phlox or Hentz's creeping phlox, is a low-growing, spreading evergreen perennial plant native to North America. It has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe minor skin irritations, wounds, and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Phlox subulata subvar. hentzii can be made into a tea or infused oil, which can be used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
